diagrams.title: DFS Tree for Cut Vertex Identification
diagrams.description: Shows DFS tree with discovery times and low values to identify articulation points
elements: Child nodes with increasing discovery times
Back edges shown as dashed lines to ancestors
Low value calculations at each node
Identification of which vertices are cut vertices
diagrams.purpose: Understanding algorithm to find articulation points using DFS

diagrams.title: Block-Cut Tree Structure
diagrams.description: Bipartite tree showing relationship between biconnected components and cut vertices
elements: Edges connecting blocks to their constituent cut vertices
Tree structure demonstrating connectivity between components
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how blocks and cut vertices are interconnected in a graph

diagrams.title: Kinds of Connectivity
diagrams.description: Comparison of vertex connectivity, edge connectivity, and minimum degree with examples
elements: Complete graph K₄ with all connections
Values of κ, λ, δ for each graph
diagrams.purpose: Understanding relationship between different connectivity measures

diagrams.title: Biconnected Components Example
diagrams.description: Graph showing identification of biconnected components and bridges
elements: Graph with cycles and cut vertices
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to decompose graph into biconnected components
